task_summary:
**Task:** A Gold customer is returning two electronics items, and each line has its own restocking math while the second one also triggers the repeat same-category surcharge. The correct handling is to apply the Gold restocking-discount credit to both items and add the $5 repeat surcharge to the USB hub as the second electronics return.

**Challenge:** This case rewards item-level accounting rather than order-level averaging. Weak agents miss one of the Gold credits, forget the repeat surcharge on the second line, or resolve only one of the two electronics returns.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must provide an item-level breakdown showing the $18 Gold discount on the headphones, the $3 Gold discount on the USB hub, and the $5 repeat-category surcharge applied to the USB hub as the second electronics return.

Agent must either call get_policies with topic "return" before the returns or explicitly account for the return-policy Gold restocking discount and repeat-category surcharge rules in the item-level explanation.

opening_message: Hi, I want to return the headphones and the USB hub from order ORD-7112. I changed my mind on both.

task_rules: Confirm return of headphones and USB hub.
If restocking fees are mentioned, ask whether the Gold restocking discount applies separately to both electronics items.
If the two electronics are previewed without an item-level breakdown, ask for separate refund math for the headphones and USB hub.
Accept fees and surcharges only if the agent explains the Gold discount on both items and the $5 repeat same-category surcharge on the USB hub as the second electronics return.
If only one item returned, ask about the other.
user_simulator.user_sim_context: You want to return two electronics items from the same order and expect your Gold status to matter on the fees. Because both items are in the same category, you assume the treatment should be similar unless the agent explains otherwise. You want a clear breakdown across both items, not one blended number with no reasoning.
